headline: Race for robotaxi market arrives in London
summary: Bristling with sensors and electronic eyes, robotaxis are appearing on London's streets, slipping silently between red buses and black cabs, as companies battle to lead Europe's emerging autonomous vehicle market.McNamara said robotaxis will ultimately become "a tourist attraction", adding that autonomous vehicles tend to wait until roads are completely clear before pulling out.

content.title: Race for robotaxi market arrives in London
content.summary: Bristling with sensors and electronic eyes, robotaxis are appearing on London's streets, slipping silently between red buses and black cabs, as companies battle to lead Europe's emerging autonomous vehicle market.McNamara said robotaxis will ultimately become "a tourist attraction", adding that autonomous vehicles tend to wait until roads are completely clear before pulling out.

thumbnail.caption: Londoners will be able to start taking robotaxis this summer, though initially with human operators on board for safety (Ben STANSALL)

headline: SpaceX Stock, Tesla Woes Cost Elon Musk His Trillionaire Status
summary: The stock market selloff this week has been painful for investors but spare a thought for Elon Musk.  The  SpaceX  and  Tesla  CEO has already lost his trillionaire status following a sharp drop in the share price of both companies.  Tesla’s 5.8% drop Tuesday took Musk’s net worth to $957 billion, according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index.

content.title: SpaceX Stock, Tesla Woes Cost Elon Musk His Trillionaire Status
content.summary: The stock market selloff this week has been painful for investors but spare a thought for Elon Musk.  The  SpaceX  and  Tesla  CEO has already lost his trillionaire status following a sharp drop in the share price of both companies.  Tesla’s 5.8% drop Tuesday took Musk’s net worth to $957 billion, according to the Bloomberg Billionaires Index.

headline: Micron Q3 earnings: How much higher can this chip stock run?
summary: AI chipmaker Micron Technology (MU) is due to report its fiscal third quarter earnings results after Wednesday's market close. The company's stock has gained by 270% year-to-date in 2026. Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman, Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley, and Opening Bell Media CEO Phil Rosen discuss how much higher Micron's stock could run following this earnings report.

content.title: Micron Q3 earnings: How much higher can this chip stock run?
content.description:
AI chipmaker Micron Technology (MU) is due to report its fiscal third quarter earnings results after Wednesday's market close. The company's stock has gained by 270% year-to-date in 2026.

Morning Brief Host Julie Hyman, Yahoo Finance Breaking News Reporter Jake Conley, and Opening Bell Media CEO Phil Rosen discuss how much higher Micron's stock could run following this earnings report.

headline: Biochar Market Forecast: US$ 910.4 Million in 2026 to US$ 2.75 Billion by 2033 | Persistence Market Research
summary: The global biochar market is expected to be valued at US$ 910.4 million in 2026 and projected to reach US$ 2,748.6 million by 2033, expanding at a CAGR of 17.1% during the forecast period. This strong growth is being supported by rising climate-change mitigation efforts, soil restoration needs, and policy frameworks that are strengthening carbon sequestration and sustainable farming adoption.

content.title: Biochar Market Forecast: US$ 910.4 Million in 2026 to US$ 2.75 Billion by 2033 | Persistence Market Research

headline: What Verizon Communications (VZ)'s Dow Exit and Simpler Plans Strategy Means For Shareholders
summary: In June 2026, Verizon Communications completed cash tender and exchange offers covering about US$1.86 billion of subsidiary notes while also being removed from the Dow Jones Industrial Average, where Alphabet will take its place. We’ll now examine how Verizon’s Dow exit and push into...

headline: Cloudflare (NET) Launches Browser Push To Sort Human And AI Traffic
summary: Cloudflare announced a new initiative with Mozilla, Google, and Microsoft to standardize privacy-preserving protocols for distinguishing human and AI-generated traffic. The collaboration centers on a proposed Private Access Control Tokens (PACT) standard that aims to verify traffic without exposing personal data. The effort is positioned as an industry-wide response to rising AI-driven and automated bot activity across the internet. Cloudflare, traded as NYSE:NET, is tying this new protocol...

headline: L8P8, Inc., Introduces Loop8ID, an Age Verification Solution to Support Online Child Safety Laws Without Collecting Personal Data
summary: L8P8, Inc., the privacy-first identity company and creator of the Loop8 passwordless Privacy Controller, today announced the launch of Loop8ID Age Shield. This groundbreaking age verification platform enables companies to navigate the complex landscape of evolving U.S. state-level child safety laws, ensuring strict compliance without the need to collect or store personal identity information.

summary: SAN FRANCISCO, June 24, 2026--The AI Conference, the leading conference for applied AI, has announced the first round of speakers from OpenAI, Anthropic, NVIDIA, Google, Meta, and more, with sessions bringing business leaders and builders together to show how AI systems are built, deployed, and scaled in practice. The conference, in conjunction with inaugural AI Week SF, takes place from September 29 to October 1 at Pier 48 in San Francisco.

headline: YouTube settles social media addiction lawsuit brought by teenager amid tidal wave of court cases
summary: YouTube's owner, Google, has settled a lawsuit brought by a teenager suing the world's biggest social media companies over their role in the youth mental health crisis.  The 16-year-old's lawyers said the terms of the settlement were confidential, but that TikTok, Snapchat, and Instagram are still set to face trial in July.  Google spokesperson Jose Castaneda said‌ the lawsuit had been amicably resolved.

content.title: YouTube settles social media addiction lawsuit brought by teenager amid tidal wave of court cases
content.summary: YouTube's owner, Google, has settled a lawsuit brought by a teenager suing the world's biggest social media companies over their role in the youth mental health crisis.  The 16-year-old's lawyers said the terms of the settlement were confidential, but that TikTok, Snapchat, and Instagram are still set to face trial in July.  Google spokesperson Jose Castaneda said‌ the lawsuit had been amicably resolved.

headline: US stocks edge higher as falling oil prices help take pressure off the market
summary: Stocks edged higher on Wall Street Wednesday as falling bond yields and lower oil prices helped ease pressure on the market.  Technology stocks were mixed after two days of losses that heavily weighed on the broader market.  Micron Technology, which reports its latest financial results later Wednesday, fell 0.4% following its 13.2% plunge on Tuesday.

headline: Why Investors Are Finally Separating Quantum Computing Winners From Losers
summary: For much of the past two years, investors treated quantum computing as a single investment theme. Whether a company pursued trapped-ion systems, superconducting qubits, quantum annealing, or photonic architectures mattered less than the fact that it was associated with quantum computing. Capital flowed broadly into the sector as investors searched for the next transformative technology ... Why Investors Are Finally Separating Quantum Computing Winners From Losers

headline: Exclusive-STT, Tata Delhi data centre fire leaves clients fearing decades of data lost; Google hit
summary: A fire at a New Delhi data centre used by global tech firms has left some customers fearing the loss of decades of data and caused network disruptions for Google Cloud services in India, according to a company letter and sources.  The blaze at the ‌STT Global Data Centres India facility, owned by Singapore's ST Telemedia and India's Tata Communications, caused "extensive damage" to parts of the site, making data recovery difficult, a Tata ‌Communications unit said in a letter to a client seen by Reuters.

content.title: Exclusive-STT, Tata Delhi data centre fire leaves clients fearing decades of data lost; Google hit
content.summary: A fire at a New Delhi data centre used by global tech firms has left some customers fearing the loss of decades of data and caused network disruptions for Google Cloud services in India, according to a company letter and sources. headline: US stocks rise as falling oil prices help take pressure off the market
summary: Stocks rose on Wall Street Wednesday as falling bond yields and lower oil prices helped ease pressure on the market.  Technology stocks were gaining ground after two days of losses that weighed on the market.  Apple rose 1.7%, Amazon jumped 3.3% and Caterpillar rose 1.8%.
